introSection: Standing Coaster is a steel stand-up roller coaster located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It was built by the Japanese manufacturer TOGO and has a somewhat compact layout, with track going through the vertical loop.
fullText:
Standing Coaster is a steel stand-up roller coaster located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It was built by the Japanese manufacturer TOGO and has a somewhat compact layout, with track going through the vertical loop.



Red track with grey supports.
